overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime drive through a neon-lit urban downtown. The camera moves through wet streets reflecting colorful neon signs in Japanese characters, passing under overhead structures and approaching a towering skyscraper. The scene features dense cyberpunk architecture with atmospheric teal and red lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit cyberpunk street with overhead signage

events.description: passing under the large red overhead neon sign with '24' and Japanese characters

agents.ego_description: driving through wet city streets at night, approaching and passing under a prominent red neon sign

notable_agents.action: car with red taillights driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: large red neon sign with '24' and Japanese characters spanning across the street overhead
yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
tall building facade with multiple glowing windows and neon signage
tall building facade with illuminated advertisements and architectural details

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet cyberpunk street at night, driving toward a prominent red neon sign overhead. The street is flanked by tall buildings with glowing facades, and a yellow crosswalk is visible in the foreground. The vehicle passes under the overhead sign structure around the 8-second mark, continuing down the narrow urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with mixed neon signage and approaching intersection

events.description: yellow taxi passes by on the left side of the street
approaching a wide intersection with yellow crosswalk markings visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street, passing a yellow taxi and approaching an intersection with a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving in the opposite direction, passing by on the left

entered.detail: large green neon arrow sign mounted on the left building facade
large illuminated digital billboard displaying colorful advertisements
broad yellow striped crosswalk spanning the wide intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: Having passed the overhead sign, the street transitions to feature more green and teal neon lighting. A yellow taxi passes on the left around 22 seconds. The camera approaches a wide intersection with a prominent yellow crosswalk, while a large green neon arrow sign becomes visible on the left building.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with crosswalk and towering skyscraper view

events.description: entering and crossing the wide intersection with yellow crosswalk markings
increased illumination from multiple large digital billboards on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving through the wide intersection, heading toward the tall skyscraper visible straight ahead

notable_agents.action: distant car visible near the right side of the intersection

entered.detail: very tall modern glass skyscraper with illuminated windows dominating the center skyline
ground-level shop windows with bright neon lighting and digital displays
large vertical digital billboard with changing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a wide intersection, crossing the yellow striped crosswalk. A massive glass skyscraper becomes visible straight ahead, dominating the view. The right side features bright storefront displays and large digital billboards that increase the ambient lighting. The scene feels more open as the camera moves through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban canyon approaching multi-level building complex

events.description: street narrows as the vehicle approaches the base of the multi-level building complex ahead

agents.ego_description: driving toward the large multi-level building complex at the end of the street, flanked by dense architecture

entered.detail: large multi-story building with parking garage levels and neon signage at the end of the street
tall vertical neon signs mounted on the left building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to a massive multi-level building complex that blocks the end of the street. The tall glass skyscraper looms closer in the center, while vertical neon signs illuminate the left facade. The street narrows into an urban canyon with dense cyberpunk architecture on both sides as the vehicle drives toward the building base.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a neon-drenched urban canyon that transitions from a narrow, red-lit street into a wide, luminous intersection dominated by a towering skyscraper. It begins on a wet asphalt road, moving toward a prominent red neon sign overhead while flanked by glowing building facades and yellow crosswalks. As the vehicle passes under the overhead structure, the lighting shifts toward green and teal hues, passing a yellow taxi before approaching a wide intersection marked by a large green neon arrow. The scene then opens up as the camera crosses the striped crosswalk, where bright storefront displays and digital billboards illuminate the path toward a massive glass skyscraper looming straight ahead. Finally, the view narrows once more into a dense architectural corridor of vertical neon signs as the vehicle drives toward the base of the multi-level building complex.
